description: Standard test prompts for prompt quality evaluation. Each prompt tests different design capabilities.

prompts.prompt: Design a login card with email input, password input, and a sign-in button
Design a dashboard with a sidebar navigation and 4 metric cards showing numbers
Design a pricing table with 3 tiers: Basic, Pro, Enterprise. Each has a price, feature list, and CTA button
Design a user profile card with avatar, name, bio, and social stats (followers, following, posts)
Design a settings page with toggle switches for notifications, dark mode, and privacy options
